query:
SELECT pv.id, pv.platform, pv.title, LEFT(pv.body, 300) as body_preview, LENGTH(pv.body) as body_length
FROM platform_variants pv
WHERE pv.id IN (
  SELECT pv2.id FROM platform_variants pv2
  JOIN content_packages cp ON cp.id = pv2.content_package_id
  JOIN ideas i ON i.id = cp.idea_id
  WHERE i.title LIKE '%Top Industry Trends%'
  LIMIT 5
)
LIMIT 10;
